---
name: Feature request
about: A capability or workflow improvement you'd like Sauce Bunny to have
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem

What are you trying to do that Sauce Bunny doesn't help with today? Be concrete — a specific workflow with a specific source is more useful than a wishlist item.

## Proposed solution

How would you imagine this working? UI sketches welcome (drag images here).

## Alternatives you've considered

Other apps that do this, or other ways you've worked around the missing capability.

## Anything else
